# Bel Ağrısı Serisi — Derleme (2026-03-15)

> Bu içerik otomatik derlenmiştir. Tıbbi öneri yerine geçmez; kişisel durumunuz için uzmana danışınız.

## 🔬 Hakemli Makaleler (PubMed)

### Author reply to critical comments on ultrasound-guided paravertebral oxygen-ozone injections.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik author reply to critical comments on ultrasound-guided paravertebral oxygen-ozone injections. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: journal of back and musculoskeletal rehabilitasyon. 2026 mar 13. Anahtar kavramlar: author, reply, critical, comments, ultrasound, guided.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41830087/

### Motor Neuron Disease with Guillain-Barré Syndrome? Motor Band Sign with Anti-GQ1b Antibodies.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik motor neuron disease with guillain-barré syndrome? motor band sign with anti-gq1b antibodies. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: diagnostics (basel, switzerland). 2026 feb 26. Anahtar kavramlar: motor, neuron, disease, guillain, barr, syndrome.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41827952/

### The Effect of Duloxetine on Fusion in Rats Undergoing Posterolateral Spinal Fusion.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik the effect of duloxetine on fusion in rats undergoing posterolateral spinal fusion. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: journal of clinical medicine. 2026 mar 9. Anahtar kavramlar: fusion, effect, duloxetine, rats, undergoing, posterolateral.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41827502/

### Effectiveness and Safety of the Combination of Paracetamol 1000 mg and Ibuprofen 300 mg Versus Ibuprofen 600 mg in Monotherapy in Acute Low Back Pain: Results from a Phase IV Randomized Study.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik effectiveness and safety of the combination of paracetamol 1000 mg and ibuprofen 300 mg versus ibuprofen 600 mg in monotherapy in acute bel ağrısı: results from a phase iv randomize study. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: journal of clinical medicine. 2026 mar 6. Anahtar kavramlar: ibuprofen, effectiveness, safety, combination, paracetamol, versus.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41827438/

### Returning to Work and Cost-Effectiveness After Lumbar Facet Cryodenervation Among Patients with Chronic Low Back Pain.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik returning to work and cost-effectiveness after lomber (bel bölgesi) facet cryodenervation among patients with chronic bel ağrısı. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: journal of clinical medicine. 2026 feb 27. Anahtar kavramlar: returning, work, cost, effectiveness, after, lomber (bel bölgesi).
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41827242/

### Prospective, non-inferiority, multicenter, randomized, single-blind clinical trial comparing cooled radiofrequency ablation to standard radiofrequency ablation to manage chronic facetogenic lumbar back pain.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik prospective, non-inferiority, multicenter, randomize, single-blind clinical klinik çalışma comparing cooled radiofrequency ablation to standard radiofrequency ablation to manage chronic facetogenic lomber (bel bölgesi) bel ağrısı. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: regional anesthesia and ağrı medicine. 2026 mar 13. Anahtar kavramlar: radiofrequency, ablation, ağrı, prospective, non, inferiority.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41825940/

### Non-pharmacological and non-surgical treatments for low back pain in adults: an overview of Cochrane reviews: Summary of a Cochrane review.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik non-pharmacological and non-surgical treatments for bel ağrısı in adults: an overview of cochrane reviews: summary of a cochrane review. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: explore (new york, n.y.). 2026 mar 3. Anahtar kavramlar: non, cochrane, pharmacological, surgical, treatments, low.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41825188/

### Efficacy of home-based low-level laser therapy in patients with low back pain: a double-blinded randomized controlled trial.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik efficacy of home-based low-level laser therapy in patients with bel ağrısı: a double-blinded randomize controlled klinik çalışma. konusuna odaklanıyor.
